response.overview: Alma is a young woman who awakens in a timeless limbo, forced to confront the weight of her existence. In this space suspended between confused and fragmented memories, she wanders through them at a relentless pace. She moves relentlessly from one memory to another, from one place to another, while a version of herself as a child follows and guides her, like a shadow from the past.
response.title: Ai nostri giorni
